ab: Malu ku knbarux hbangan sunan?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Malu wah! Khnu ka ddiyun su?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Cnhungi ku madas hbangan da, malu ku knbarux hbangan su hu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Ini ku adas hbangan uri wah!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Cnhungi ku madas pila da, malu ku knbarux pila su hu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Uxay ku, ini su brnahi muway knan ka knbrxan su cnduray na.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Malu ku knbarux lukus su hu?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Iyaq, hayi nanaq mangal ka isu.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Malu ku knbarux patas su hu?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Wada mu kbrxan Tiwas Pawan da.
en: B: I lent it to Tiwas Pawan.

ab: Kbrxi ku ddeyngsya su haw?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Iyaq, binaw brnahi ku hmaduc kusun dungan.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Qmuyux da, ini ku adas trasi, kbrxi ku trasi haw?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: Kingal balay ka trasi mu, psupu ta dmuwi pa!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Ni ka patas knbrxan misu cnduray, tbrnahun misu muway.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Smatang su mita mmnnu patas na? Malu su srngaw knan kana.
ch: B:還想看什麼書?您都可以跟我說。
en: B: What else do you want to read? You can tell me anything.

ab: So knuwan ka brnahun misu muway hbangan?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Ini huya, pprngaw ta niqan su hbangan nxal da.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Tbrnahun su muway knuwan ka hbangan mu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Tbrnahun misu muway kusun.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Tbrnahun su muway knuwan ka patas mu?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Uxay misu tbrnahun muway ciwa dpa?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Knbrxan su na Kurak Tanah ka impicu ni hu?
ch: A:這支筆是Kurak Tanah借你的嗎?
en: A: Did Kurak Tanah lend you this pen?

ab: Iyaq, nsan mu knbarux hiya ka saya.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Knbrxan su Bawah Harung ka impicu ni hu?
ch: A:這支筆是你跟Bawah Harung借的嗎?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Bawah Harung?

ab: Uxay, bnari bubu mu ka ni.
en: B: No, this is what my mom bought.

ab: Uka timu da, usa knbarux Kumu Nawi tikuh timu han.
ch: A:沒有鹽了，去跟Kumu Nawi借點鹽。
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Kumu Nawi.

ab: Iyaq, hayi mu knbarux han.
en: B:Well, I'll go borrow it first.

ab: Plwani ka Trmi Puhuk, so ku na brnahun muway ka hbangan mu.
en: B: Go tell Trmi Puhuk to return my money.

ab: Knhnu pila ka knbrxan su na hu?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
